description_long: This bungalow features a broad, low-pitched hip roof with brown shingles and a wide overhang, providing substantial shade to the structure below. The exterior walls are smooth and light-colored, likely finished with plaster or stucco, and the building sits on a rectangular concrete or stone platform that extends outward to form a walkway or patio. The front and rear facades each have a large, open entryway without visible doors, suggesting a traditional or open-plan design. The roof includes a central ridge and subtle venting detail, enhancing both ventilation and visual interest. There are no visible windows or decorative elements, giving the building a minimalist and functional appearance. The overall form and materials suggest a practical, single-story residential structure suitable for warm climates.
description: A single-story bungalow with a wide, brown hip roof, light-colored walls, and open entryways on both front and back, set on a rectangular stone or concrete platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open entryway, wide hip roof, and extended platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the deep roof overhang and absence of windows or doors.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with another open entryway and the same roof and platform features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the roof's overhang and solid wall.
